Package com.saperion.conversion

Class UpdateDocumentInputTypeFromUpdateInfoAdapter

java.lang.Object
com.lexmark.saperion.document.UpdateDocumentInputType
com.saperion.conversion.UpdateDocumentInputTypeFromUpdateInfoAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.lexmark.saperion.adapter.BeanAdapter<com.lexmark.saperion.document.UpdateDocumentInputType>, Serializable
public class UpdateDocumentInputTypeFromUpdateInfoAdapter extends com.lexmark.saperion.document.UpdateDocumentInputType implements com.lexmark.saperion.adapter.BeanAdapter<com.lexmark.saperion.document.UpdateDocumentInputType>
This class converts from UpdateDocumentInfo to UpdateDocumentInputType.
Author:
jschwarz
